### Hi there 👋
![MasterHead](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/90236635/232446433-d5540fa2-fe28-4bb8-b929-cdb51fe61336.gif)]
- [ ] <h1 align="center">Hi 👋, I'm AmbatiBhargavi</h1>
- [ ] <img align="right" alt="Coding" width="400" src='https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/74038190/235224431-e8c8c12e-6826-47f1-89fb-2ddad83b3abf.gif'>

<p align="left"> <img src="https://komarev.com/ghpvc/?username=ambatibhargavi&label=Profile%20views&color=0e75b6&style=flat" alt="ambatibhargavi" /> </p>

🔭 Currently working on: Building and deploying LLM-powered applications, Dockerizing and orchestrating services using Kubernetes, and creating DevOps tutorials.
🌱 Currently learning: Advanced DevOps practices, Terraform automation, and cloud-native technologies like AWS.
👯 Looking to collaborate on: Open-source DevOps tools, AI/ML integration projects, and containerized microservices.
🤔 Looking for help with: Scaling AI models in production environments and optimizing Kubernetes deployments.
💬 Ask me about: DevOps workflows, containerization, CI/CD pipelines, and creating custom LLMs.
😄 Pronouns: She/Her
⚡ Fun fact: I'm a huge fan of automating tasks to save time, and I enjoy experimenting with creative AI applications in my free time.

- 📫 How to reach me **ambatibhargavi977@gmail.com**
